title: QuickShulker NeoForged
description: An unofficial Forge/NeoForge port of QuickShulker.
body:
QuickShulker NeoForged is an unofficial Forge / NeoForge port of QuickShulker.

It lets you quickly open supported containers without placing them down, including:

- Shulker Boxes
- Ender Chests
- Crafting Tables
- Stonecutters
- Anvils

Supported ways to open:

- Press a keybind while holding the item
- Right-click while holding the item
- Press the keybind while hovering over the item in your inventory
- Right-click the item while hovering over it in your inventory

This mod is designed for client + server installation and focuses on keeping the original QuickShulker behavior while supporting Forge 1.20.1 and NeoForge 1.21.1.

For the full feature list, current release notes, known limitations, and documentation, please see the [GitHub documentation](https://github.com/Ice2974/QuickShulker-NeoForged/tree/main/docs).
